svg.text: Air-gapped incident context extracted via DuckDB → mounted read-only into WebUI container → immediate operator awareness
• Pivot: cross-reference IOCs across data lake
1. webui down → n8n down → infra down
ZERO STATE -- ATTACK SURFACE RETURNED TO ZERO
Only forensic artifacts persist (WebUI RAG data, operator chat history). All containers, databases, contexts, and secrets destroyed.
PHASE 1 (Sensor) → PHASE 2 (Swarm Analysis) → PHASE 3 (Bootstrap) → PHASE 4 (Operator C&C) → PHASE 5 (Containment) → PHASE 6 (Feedback/Teardown) → ZERO STATE
